title: Blockin' - Place that Block!
body:
![A banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd791bf118fedad6f69440e8591a44594415884d_0.webp)

# Now we are Blockin' 👀

Hmmmmm, I bet you are wondering what makes this data-pack so special, aren't ya?

Well, it's actually very simple. Every time you place a certain block, a really cool sound effect and particles will be triggered at the block's exact position. It's a small detail that adds a lot of atmosphere to your game.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/BkpEq9lMhVA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# That's it 🎯

Just download the datapack (don't forget to give a fav) load it on your world and start placing blocks! You don't need any set-up or dependencies. MinhoCreates gives you quality just for you!
If you no longer need this project, just remove it from your datapack's folder.

Working on single-player, multi-player, vanilla, plugin-loaders, mod-loaders, realms. Experimental Features Free.

As time passes by we are going to add new effects and support for new blocks. If you want to contribute we would love hearing from you on our discord server.

This is the actual block list, for the newest version:

- >         "minecraft:amethyst_block",
- >         "minecraft:beacon",
- >         "minecraft:cherry_leaves",
- >         "minecraft:chiseled_tuff",
- >         "minecraft:chiseled_tuff_bricks",
- >         "minecraft:copper_block",
- >         "minecraft:diamond_block",
- >         "minecraft:emerald_block",
- >         "minecraft:enchanting_table",
- >         "minecraft:gold_block",
- >         "minecraft:magma_block",
- >         "minecraft:netherite_block",
- >         "minecraft:polished_tuff",
- >         "minecraft:redstone_block",
- >         "minecraft:soul_sand",
- >         "minecraft:soul_soil",
- >         "minecraft:tuff",
- >         "minecraft:tuff_bricks"
